generated_from: tools/parse/ride.mjs — validated 7/7 on captures/selected/ (1 dump cassé légitimement rejeté)

schema_assumption.rationale: Uber Driver release build with R8/ProGuard strips viewIdResourceName and contentDescription. All identification relies on class + text + bounds.

features.name: bottom_action_button
features.description: Wide Button in the bottom half of the screen (the accept / interested action).

features.name: pickup_eta
features.description: Combined pickup ETA pattern: 'X min (Y km)'.

features.name: multiple_km
features.description: At least 2 km mentions (pickup distance + trip distance).

price.description: Standalone price preferred; fallback = largest price-shaped match anywhere.

trip_distance_km.description: Single km mention outside the pickup ETA pattern (e.g. 'Course de 6.8 km' / 'Trip 6.8 km').

driver_rating.description: Standalone short decimal (e.g. '4,78'). Excludes price-shaped texts.

pickup_address.description: First TextView whose text contains a postal-code + locality marker.

action_label.description: Text of the Button used by `bottom_action_button`. Used for display/debug only — not used in detection (Uber localizes/AB-tests the label).

vehicle_type.description: First short (<40 chars) TextView whose text does not match any structured pattern (price, pickup ETA, km, min, rating, postal address) and is not the action label.

tags.description: All remaining TextViews that are not structured fields, not the vehicle type, not the action label, and not in `noise_labels_by_locale`. Captures 'Exclusivité', 'Course longue (+30 min)', priority bonus messages, etc.
